description: First 2000-Agent API-backed scale-transfer experiment using a 360-vehicle conserved fleet and unchanged formal behavior rules.

outdoor_exposure.bus: origin access walk plus wait plus destination access walk
outdoor_exposure.metro: station access and egress walking only; platform wait is indoors
outdoor_exposure.w2_rain_method: outdoor minutes overlapping active heavy-rain windows

scale_definition.interpretation: Scale-transfer starting point preserving the 200-Agent mechanism ratio and approximate aggregate road-pressure representation; not a calibrated Shanghai fleet estimate.

scope_notes: The 200-Agent population and 48-vehicle fleet are a proportional mechanism scale-up from the selected 50-Agent/12-vehicle setting.
Bus and metro timetables, mode-choice parameters, activity rules and weather rules are unchanged.
Bus and metro boarding remain guaranteed; only ride-hailing has a finite vehicle pool.
W0, W1 and W2 use the same seed, Agents and planned activities. This smoke test is not a calibrated population threshold or Shanghai forecast.
